description: Fetches and extracts structured content from a web page URL

url_variable.description: Canvas variable name holding the URL to scrape

extract_fields.description: List of field names to extract from the page (e.g. 'title', 'price', 'description')

content.description: Extracted fields as a key-value map. If extract_fields is empty, returns full page text.

success.description: Whether the page was successfully fetched and parsed
